evals.prompt: 用反复横跳老板的风格在三个不同的产品方向间摇摆，但听起来都很合理
evals.expected_output: 一系列contradictory的指示，每个都sound confident，buried insight关于市场信号

evals.prompt: Can you give me clear direction on whether we should go mobile-first or desktop-first?
evals.expected_output: Message that gives one direction, then backtracks, then suggests both, sounds strategic throughout, buried insight about user data

evals.prompt: 帮我用反复改需求的老板风格改变之前的决定，让团队听起来像是自己的主意
evals.expected_output: 看起来深思熟虑的decision reversal，80%理由20%信息，buried insight关于真实的驱动因素
